subject: A massive bull-headed minotaur roaring as it charges forward, horns lowered, mouth open in a furious bellow
description: A hulking minotaur dominates the frame, its bull-like head thrown forward with mouth gaped open in a roar. Massive curved horns sweep out from its skull and dark shaggy fur covers its powerful shoulders and arms. The figure surges toward the viewer in a low forward lunge, fists or hooves churning. The entire scene is washed in saturated reds and deep crimson shadows, with hot orange highlights along the fur and musculature suggesting either firelight or rage made visible. The background is an abstract red haze, all atmosphere and no specific terrain, which throws the creature's silhouette and snarling face into sharp relief.
foreground: charging minotaur, mouth open in roar, horns lowered
background: abstract red haze, smoke-and-fire atmosphere with no defined setting
emotion: enraged, furious, snarling — pure aggression and bestial fury
